title: LaTeX Paper Assembly, Statistics Update, Compilation, and Quality Verification
summary: Demo notebook loads pre-computed evaluation data from a LaTeX paper assembly pipeline (Circuit Motif Spectroscopy paper). Analyzes 9 curated paper components (5 sections, 2 tables, 2 figures) from a 25-page research paper. Demonstrates statistics pattern checking in LaTeX text, quality metrics computation (M1-M10), and visualizes a 3-panel dashboard showing metrics scorecard, word count distribution, and citation density per section. All 10 quality metrics achieve PASS status.
